recipes.name: (Heroic)
recipes.effectRaw: +5 Enhancement bonus to Spell Penetration. If this is slotted in a Quarterstaff, also grants a +1 Exceptional bonus to Spell DCs and makes the Quarterstaff an Implement.
costRaw: +9 Enhancement bonus to Spell Penetration. If this is slotted in a Quarterstaff, also grants a +2 Exceptional bonus to Spell DCs and makes the Quarterstaff an Implement

recipes.name: (Heroic)

recipes.name: (Heroic - Dreadful)
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Good alignment bypass and Flaming. This effect causes the edges of this weapon to burn with enchanted flames, dealing 6d6 Fire damage on each critical hit. Bug: Dolorous Flames grants Alchemical Fire Attunement and does not grant Flaming.
costRaw: Adds Good alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells have a small chance to deal a large amount of Fire damage. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Fire Attunement)

recipes.name: (Heroic - Dreadful)
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Chaotic alignment bypass and Freezing. This effect causes the edges of this weapon to become frozen to the touch, dealing 6d6 Ice damage on each critical hit. Bug: Dolorous Chill grants Alchemical Water Attunement and does not grant Freezing.
costRaw: Adds Chaotic alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells have a chance to inflict ten stacks of Cold damage over time. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Water Attunement)

recipes.name: (Heroic - Dreadful)
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Lawful alignment bypass and Jolting. This effect causes the edges of this weapon to arc with electricity, dealing 6d6 Lightning damage on each critical hit. Bug: Dolorous Sparks grants Alchemical Air Attunement and does not grant Jolting.
costRaw: Adds Lawful alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells have a small chance to deal a massive amount of Electric damage. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Air Attunement)

recipes.name: (Heroic - Dreadful)
recipes.effectRaw: Adds Evil alignment bypass and Corroding. This effect causes the edges of this weapon to drip with acid, dealing 6d6 Acid damage on each critical hit. Bug: Dolorous Acid grants Alchemical Earth Attunement and does not grant Corroding.
costRaw: Adds Evil alignment bypass. Your attacks and spells deal a large amount of stacking Acid damage over time. (undocumented) (Grants Alchemical Earth Attunement)

recipes.name: (Legendary)
recipes.effectRaw: N/A (no Heroic version of this augment)
costRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to deal Untyped damage. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Steam)

recipes.name: (Legendary)
recipes.effectRaw: N/A (no Heroic version of this augment)
costRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to apply a Curse that deals significant Untyped damage over time. (undocumented) (Untyped damage DOT with 6d6+6 damage every 2 seconds for 12 sec, consecutive attacks extend duration to 1 min 25 sec)

Enemy attacks have a 15% chance to miss you due to your incorporeality. You receive a +5 enhancement bonus to your Hide and Move Silently skills.

recipes.effectRaw: Your attacks and offensive spells have a chance to significantly slow your enemies. This inflicts 8 stacks, which fade over time. This effect has a short internal cooldown. Doesn't affect bosses. (undocumented) (Grants Legendary Salt)

recipes.name: Woeful Shadow
recipes.effectRaw: +3% Profane Doublestrike and Doubleshot, +15% Enhancement Bonus to Melee Alacrity, +20% Enhancement Bonus to Ranged Alacrity.
